lineTimings.speaker: Arman
lineTimings.text: Welcome back. Today we are looking at how an AI podcast pipeline should work.

lineTimings.speaker: Maya
lineTimings.text: The key is simple: research first, verify every important claim, then generate audio.

lineTimings.speaker: Arman
lineTimings.text: That pipeline gives operators something they can inspect, retry, and trust.

lineTimings.speaker: Maya
lineTimings.text: And once the episode exists, a video renderer can turn it into a polished visual asset for podcast apps and social platforms.

scenes.headline: The AI Podcast Pipeline
scenes.subheadline: A finished episode becomes a structured video.

scenes.headline: Research first. Audio last.
scenes.subheadline: The visual should track the verified content.

scenes.headline: Rendered by Remotion
scenes.subheadline: Directed by Gemini. Timed to the podcast.

productionNotes: Sample plan showing how Gemini should direct Remotion layout choices.
